[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00011100 3
1 00000000 a
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 10000011 3
5 10000111 4
6 00000111 3
7 01100100 3

12 21 10000111 4 match 5

34 43 01100100 3 match 7

56 65 00011100 3 match 0
67 76 10011100 4
70 07 10001001 3
